assertions: verdict_correct: final verdict matches ground truth
calibrated_confidence: numeric confidence stated, justified, and matched to evidence strength (not a house 0.95/0.97 with boilerplate residual)
distribution_checked: per-day row distribution verified uniform/no gaps from the CSV
not_lazy_inconclusive: does NOT punt to INCONCLUSIVE — the data was sufficient
residual_named: the unexplained 5,200 dashboard figure flagged as the open question
